title: pera citriodora
intro: Pera citriodora, also known as Lemon-scented myrtle or Lemon myrtle, is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the family Myrtaceae. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of pera citriodora include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and providing antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of pera citriodora, such as tea, essential oil, and capsules, can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
